history.content:
<thought>
The goal is down and to the right, but there is lava directly in the middle area. From my current position facing right, moving forward along the top row is safe and helps me approach the goal while avoiding the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right toward an empty cell, but the goal is below and to the right. Moving forward would only take me to the top-right area, while the direct path downward is blocked by lava. I should first reposition by turning to face down so I can navigate around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down toward a lava cell directly ahead, so moving forward is unsafe. The goal is down-right of me, so I should first turn to face right and look for a safe path around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and there is an empty cell directly ahead, but the goal is below-right and lava blocks the direct downward route from my current column. I should first move forward to the rightmost safe cell to line up with the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right toward a wall, so moving forward is blocked. To make progress toward the goal below, I should turn to face downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the top-right open cell facing down. Moving forward would go toward the open cell below, but the goal is further down-left and there is lava blocking the direct path. First I should move down to position myself to navigate around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, with a wall directly below me, so moving forward would fail. The goal is to my left and down, and first I should turn to face left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left, and the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. The goal is below and to the right, so I should first turn to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly in front of me is the goal. Moving forward reaches it immediately.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
